Ee video lo, manam ippudu IT sector lo unna oka dangerous phase gurinchi matladukundam. Oka pakka US-Iran tensions valla global economy ela debba tintundi? Strait of Hormuz block ayite mana Bangalore, Hyderabad IT jobs enduku potayi? AI valla software developers career ela marabotundi?
In this deep dive into the shifting landscape of the Indian IT industry, we cover: 🔸 The Geopolitical Chain Reaction: How the Strait of Hormuz and Middle East tensions dictate US tech budgets and Indian layoffs. 🔸 The Inflation Trap: Understanding how US Federal Reserve interest rates directly impact TCS, Infosys, and Wipro projects. 🔸 AI as a Weapon: Why companies are using AI to replace "Doers" with "Reviewers" during budget cuts. 🔸 Polaris School of Technology: A revolutionary 4-year integrated B.Tech in Bangalore that is preparing students for an AI-first world. 🔸 The Top 3 Survival Skills: Detailed breakdown of AI-Driven Development, Cloud Security, and System Architecture for the next decade.
Join our community as we decode the data and prepare for the upcoming technical revolution. Meeru emukuntunnaru? AI valla jobs potaya leka kotha opportunities vastaya? Comment section lo teliyajeyandi!

item.description:

నాసాలో పనిచేసిన ఒక సైంటిస్ట్, ఒక బెస్ట్ టీచర్... సడన్ గా అమెరికా ప్రెసిడెంట్ ని టార్గెట్ చేస్తూ వాషింగ్టన్ లో ఎందుకు అంత పెద్ద సెక్యూరిటీ బ్రీచ్ కి ప్లాన్ చేశాడు?

Ee video lo, Washington Hilton hotel lo jarigina White House Correspondents' Dinner security incident gurinchi FBI investigation lo bayatapadda shocking nijalu telusukundam. Cole Tomas Allen ane oka highly educated NASA research fellow, VVIPs unna hall loki ela enter ayyadu? Aa 10 nimishala mundu vachina manifesto loni dark secrets enti?
In this deep dive into one of the most high-profile security investigations, we cover: 🔸 The Suspect's Past: How a brilliant Caltech graduate, game developer, and award-winning teacher became the mastermind behind this massive security threat. 🔸 The Security Breach: The surprising details of how the suspect bypassed the metal detectors and used a 'makeshift room' right under the nose of the Secret Service. 🔸 The Armoured Protection: The secret 'undercover agents' posing as guests and the hidden armoured plates that ensured the President's safe escape. 🔸 The Mysterious Manifesto: What was written in the letter sent just 10 minutes before the incident, and the strange psychological reasoning behind his actions. 🔸 The "Kash Patel" Exception: The biggest mystery of the target list—why was the FBI Director specifically excluded from the manifesto? 🔸 The Conspiracy Theories: Unraveling the strange internet clues and the bizarre "Henry Martinez" connection linking 2014 to 2023.
Join us as we decode the incredible mystery behind this Washington DC incident. Ee incident loni Kash Patel exception mariyu Henry Martinez mystery paina mee thoughts ento kinda comment section lo maku teliya cheyandi.

వాషింగ్టన్ లో షాకింగ్ ఎటాక్ మరియు చబహార్ పోర్ట్ లో ఇండియా వేసిన జియోపొలిటికల్ మాస్టర్ స్ట్రోక్!
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, prapanchanni okkasariga shock ki guri chesina Washington DC Hilton hotel VVIP security breach gurinchi, mariyu Donald Trump escape aina katha detail ga telusukundam. Ade time lo, Iran tho peace talks cancel chesina 10 nimishallo em jarigindi? Chabahar port sanctions nundi tappinchukovadaniki mana India vesina "Tactical Masterstroke" ento chuddam!
In this deep dive into the latest global geopolitical mind games, we cover: 🔸 The Washington Incident: How a massive security breach happened at the highly secure White House Correspondents' Dinner, causing a VVIP emergency. 🔸 The 1981 Connection: The shocking historical parallel between this event and the Ronald Reagan incident at the exact same location 45 years ago. 🔸 US vs Iran Mind Games: Why Trump abruptly canceled the Islamabad peace talks and the mysterious proposal that arrived just 10 minutes later. 🔸 Operation Economic Fury: The US Treasury's massive crackdown on the "shadow fleet" transporting resources in the Arabian Sea. 🔸 India's Chabahar Masterstroke: How the Indian government executed a brilliant geopolitical and tactical move to protect its 23-year-old strategic port investment from expiring US sanctions.
Ee global political mind games lo India vesina master plan paina mee opinion ento kinda comment cheyandi!
#VRRaja #Geopolitics #IndiaForeignPolicy #ChabaharPort #CurrentAffairsTelugu #WorldPolitics

item.title: 🎬Michael Jackson Dark Side of the King of Pop | 39 World Records & Epstein Files | VR Raja Explains
item.description:
🎬Michael Jackson Dark Side of the King of Pop | 39 World Records & Epstein Files | VR Raja Explains
📈 Open FREE Demat Account (Best for Beginners): (Free Research & Recommendations included) 👉 https://tinyurl.com/bdssxh9n
Naa Top 63 Stocks List (Large, Mid, Small Cap) kavala? Telegram lo Join avvandi! 👇
✅ Join Telegram Channel (For 63 Stocks List): 👉 https://t.me/+KxJB7hykn5Q1NjVl
⏮️ Stock market Playlist: 👉 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HG4GCaYtgrs&list=PLWqvN0qdOOWO_Hyf75IyKviGkb6u-NDAU
మైఖేల్ జాక్సన్: ఒక లెజెండ్ వెనుక ఉన్న కన్నీటి కథ! కింగ్ ఆఫ్ పాప్ నిజంగానే క్రిమినలా?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
ఈ వీడియోలో, ప్రపంచాన్ని తన పాటలతో, స్టెప్పులతో ఊపేసిన మైఖేల్ జాక్సన్ (Michael Jackson) జీవితంలోని ఆసక్తికరమైన మరియు షాకింగ్ విషయాలను డీకోడ్ చేద్దాం. 2274 పాటలు, 10 సోలో ఆల్బమ్స్, 8 గ్రామీ అవార్డులు.. ఇవన్నీ ఒకెత్తయితే, ఆయన చుట్టూ ఉన్న కాంట్రవర్సీలు ఇంకో ఎత్తు.
In this deep-dive documentary, VR Raja explains: 🔸 The Brutal Childhood: How Joseph Jackson’s strictness and physical abuse shaped (and scarred) Michael. 🔸 The Apollo Breakthrough: The night at Harlem that changed the Jackson 5 forever. 🔸 Thriller Revolution: How MJ broke racial barriers on MTV and created the Moonwalk magic. 🔸 The Trauma & Injections: The shocking claims about MJ’s health and his father’s interference. 🔸 The Allegations: A detailed look at the 1993 Jordan Chandler case and the $23 Million settlement. 🔸 Neverland & Epstein: Did MJ really go to Epstein Island? The truth behind the conspiracy theories. 🔸 The Final Act: The tragic overdose of Propofol and the "This Is It" comeback dream.
MJ జీవితం ఒక అద్భుతం, కానీ అది ఒక విషాదంలో ఎలా ముగిసింది? పాప్‌కార్న్ తెచ్చుకొని కూర్చోండి, ఈ 'Not Just a Documentary' మిమ్మల్ని ఒక కొత్త లోకంలోకి తీసుకెళ్తుంది!
#VRRaja #MichaelJackson #KingOf Pop #MJDocumentary #Moonwalk #Thriller #Jackson5 #NeverlandRanch #EpsteinFiles #telugudocumentary
Follow Us On Social Media: ► Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/iamvrraja?igsh=YXBmbzV6NDYzNXAx ► Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/19DbBnQBqy/?mibextid=wwXIfr

item.title: ‼️⚠️ MISSS AVVADDUUU… AI AGENTS, AUTOMATION AND THE FUTURE | Ft @vaibhavsisinty Raw Talks With VK |
item.description:
AI Community Link: https://stayingahead.ai/vk (For all the resources and latest updates)
⚠️ Your competition already watched this. ⚠️ Vaibhav Sisinty is back for Round 2 on Raw Talks With VK and this time he is armed with not just answers but newer questions. The previous episode with Vaibhav became one of the most watched AI podcasts in Telugu. Thousands of people said it shaped how they think about their career, money, and future. In this episode we cover: - The difference between AI assistants, AI agents, and AI automation - The ADAPT Framework - Vaibhav’s Jerry: a personal AI agent that manages emails, calls, calendar, content, and brand deals - Anthropic’s Claude Mythos - OpenAI’s Industrial Policy for the Intelligence Age - Universal Basic Income vs. Universal High Income and why Elon Musk thinks money may lose its value - AI hardware revolution Meta Orion glasses, OpenAI's Dime earpiece, Alter Ego brain-wave tech, and Neuralink - AI privacy, the ChatGPT message leak, running AI locally for free, and protecting your data
The biggest AI money opportunities right now: consulting, content creation, vibe coding, and AI agents as a service
Watch this with a pen and paper. Every minute has something worth writing down.
👍 Like if this changed how you think about AI. 🔔 Subscribe to Raw Talks With VK for weekly conversations that make you curious.
00:00:00 Opening & Why Watch This Podcast 00:07:00 AI Reality Check 00:11:45 Building AI Agents 00:21:42 Cost, Efficiency & Local AI 00:30:55 Privacy, Trust & Behavior 00:35:04 Economics of AI 00:42:59 The ADAPT Framework 00:56:06 Opportunities & New Economy 01:05:16 Future of Work & Society 01:16:01 Power, Competition & Influence 01:27:05 Hardware & Interface Shift 01:35:41 Advanced Behavior 01:47:01 Human + Future (Part 2 Tease)

In this deep dive into the latest international strategic developments, we cover: 🔸 The Tactical Pause: Why Iran's leadership believes Trump's ceasefire extension is just a ploy to buy time for a surprise operation. 🔸 Pakistan's Trap: How Pakistan is claiming credit for peace while unintentionally stepping into a massive diplomatic minefield. 🔸 The Hormuz Crisis: The latest incident where an IRGC speedboat fired upon a container ship, proving the tension is far from over. 🔸 Global Seizures: The US Navy boarding the M/T Tifani near Sri Lanka and putting massive pressure on Iran's oil storage facilities. 🔸 Europe's Entry: The secret London summit where the UK and France are planning a multinational military mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz. 🔸 India's Diplomatic Role: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh's subtle hints at India stepping up as a highly credible, neutral mediator in the future.

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.title: Memory of a Killer
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Memory of a Killer.

Memory of a Killer is a dramatic thriller about a hitman who develops early onset Alzheimer's. Angelo lives a double life as an assassin and a family man - which all worked out well until he was hit with early onset Alzheimer's. Now his worlds are colliding, putting his family in danger.

item.description:
follow us on X @ x.com/speaknsee follow us on Rumble @ speaknseeRumble follow us on Facebook @ https://www.facebook.com/speaknsee
Also join the Patron @ speaknsee.com website.
"The numbers don’t lie. 70% of global terrorism deaths come from just 5 countries that make up only 8% of the world’s population. Muslims are the biggest victims of Islamist violence, yet many still flee these countries only to push similar ideas elsewhere. This isn’t hate — it’s pattern recognition."
This video takes a critical look at Islamophobia, exploring why it's a topic of frequent debate and often perceived as an understandable response to recurring patterns. We discuss the data indicating that the majority of victims of islamic extremism are fellow muslims, and how this contributes to the broader social critique. Join us as we examine the complexities of religion and the implications of this phenomenon.

item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

item.title: Ludwig
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ludwig.

Can accidental detective John 'Ludwig' Taylor crack the biggest puzzle of his life - finding his missing brother?

item.title: Welcome to Chippendales
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Welcome to Chippendales.

A sprawling true-crime saga, Welcome to Chippendales tells the outrageous story of Somen "Steve" Banerjee, an Indian immigrant who became the unlikely founder of the world's greatest male-stripping empire - and let nothing stand in his way in the process. The series details the insane, darkly comedic, crime-ridden story behind the unique male revue that became a cultural phenomenon.

item.title: The Beauty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Beauty.

When international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways, two FBI agents are sent to Paris, Venice, Rome and New York to uncover the truth behind these deaths and end up discovering a conspiracy that threatens the future of humanity.

item.title: CIA
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: CIA.

CIA centers on two unlikely partners — a fast-talking, rule-breaking loose cannon CIA case officer, and a by-the-book, seasoned and smart FBI agent who believes in the rule of law. When this odd couple are assigned to work out of CIA's New York Station, they must learn to work together to investigate cases and criminals posing threats on U.S. soil, finding that their differences may actually be their strength.

item.title: Marshals
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Marshals.

Marshals stars Luke Grimes reprising his role as Kayce Dutton. With the Yellowstone Ranch behind him, Dutton joins an elite unit of U.S. Marshals, combining his skills as a cowboy and Navy SEAL to bring range justice to Montana. Kayce and his teammates - Pete Calvin, Belle Skinner, Andrea Cruz and Miles Kittle - must balance the high psychological cost of serving as the last line of defense in the region's war on violence with their duty to their families, which for Kayce includes his son Tate and his confidants Thomas Rainwater and Mo from the Broken Rock reservation.

item.title: Live, Interactive Power BI Dashboards – An Eye-Feast in Action | Power BI Training | Data Analytics
item.description:
In this session, we explore Live, Interactive Power BI Dashboards – An Eye-Feast in Action and demonstrate how Power BI transforms raw data into meaningful insights through interactive dashboards.
The session covers how filters, slicers, drill-down features, and dynamic visuals help users explore data and make better business decisions.
This session is conducted by Mr. Prashyuth, who has 13+ years of experience in the IT industry, sharing practical insights on how Power BI is used in real-world projects.
In this session you will learn:
• How interactive Power BI dashboards work • Using filters and slicers effectively • Drill-down analysis in dashboards • Building visually engaging reports • Understanding the Power BI learning path and career opportunities in Data Analytics
If you are interested in learning Power BI and building a career in Data Analytics, this session will give you a clear understanding of the possibilities.
🔗 Join our WhatsApp community for updates and learning resources: https://chat.whatsapp.com/LNFZbPxPYn52dGMydLSw1J

item.title: Data to Dashboards: Power BI Live Session
item.description:
📊 Data to Dashboards – Power BI Live Session
In this session, we explored the fundamentals of Business Intelligence (BI) and how organizations transform raw data into meaningful insights using Power BI dashboards.
In today’s data-driven world, understanding how data is collected, processed, and visualized is an essential skill. Tools like Power BI help businesses turn raw data into interactive reports and dashboards that support better decision-making.
🔎 What you’ll learn in this session: • What is Business Intelligence (BI) • Benefits of BI in modern organizations • Data Collection from multiple sources • Understanding the ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) process • How raw data is converted into dashboards • Introduction to Power BI and data visualization
👨‍💻 Session conducted by an industry expert with 13+ years of IT experience, sharing practical insights from real-world projects.
📲 Want to learn more about Data Analytics & Power BI? Join our WhatsApp community for updates on upcoming sessions, learning resources, and career guidance.
👉 Join WhatsApp Group: https://chat.whatsapp.com/LNFZbPxPYn52dGMydLSw1J

item.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite.

WarnerMedia announced today that it is partnering with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), the new professional wrestling promotion featuring a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience for the first time in 20 years. WarnerMedia and AEW together will build this powerhouse sporting league from the ground up and will begin airing weekly matches later this year. With this league, AEW is introducing a new generation of wrestlers to fans, offering fun, gripping and authentic athletic matches that will make wrestling more accessible to a broad audience.

item.title: RPA Workshop: Building Flows with Power Automate & UiPath (9 Feb 2026, 8:00 AM IST)
RPA UiPath Hands‑on Demo (Feb 6, 8:00 AM IST)
item.description:
This video is the recording of the second demo session from our UiPath RPA Training program by RPAVault.
In this session, you’ll get clarity on: What UiPath RPA is and how it’s used in real projects
Training flow and learning roadmap Real-time automation scenarios Career opportunities in RPA Participant questions and answers This session is useful for freshers, career switchers, and working professionals who want to build a strong foundation in UiPath automation.
👨‍🏫 Trainer: Mr. Raghava Tadikonda (11+ years of RPA experience) 🎓 Trusted by: 5000+ learners
Watch the full recording to understand how UiPath can help you move forward in your automation journey.

item.title: 🚀 UiPath RPA Training Batch – Live Demo Session | RPAVAULT
item.description:
🚀 UiPath RPA Training Batch – Live Demo Session | RPAVAULT
Welcome to our live demo session of UiPath RPA Training by RPAVAULT. This session is designed for beginners, working professionals, and career switchers who want to build a strong career in Robotic Process Automation (RPA) using UiPath. 🔍 What you’ll learn in this demo: ✅ Introduction to RPA & UiPath ✅ Real-time project overview ✅ UiPath tool features & use cases ✅ Career opportunities in RPA ✅ Course structure & learning roadmap ✅ Q&A with the trainer 👨‍🏫 Trainer: Mr. Raghava Tadikonda ✔ 11+ years of real-time RPA experience ✔ Trained 5000+ learners ✔ Industry-focused & job-oriented training 🎯 Why RPAVAULT? 🔹 Practical, real-time training 🔹 Interview-focused learning 🔹 Resume & mock interview support 🔹 100% job-oriented guidance

item.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms.

A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.

item.title: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy.

Star Trek: Starfleet Academy is set in the 32nd century, a time period in the far-future of the Star Trek franchise where Starfleet and the United Federation of Planets are recovering from a cataclysmic event, as depicted in Star Trek: Discovery. It introduces viewers to a young group of cadets who come together to pursue a common dream of hope and optimism. Under the watchful and demanding eyes of their instructors, they discover what it takes to become Starfleet officers as they navigate blossoming friendships, explosive rivalries, first loves and a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation itself.

item.title: Azure Data Engineer Demo Meeting
RPA Power Automate Second Session
RPA Power Automate First Session
The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City.

The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City takes viewers into an undiscovered world that is about so much more than religion, although the Mormon church is undeniably engrained in the culture. In the majestic mountains of Utah is a hidden social circle made up of successful women who have created their own paradise filled with luxury homes, shopping sprees and multi-million-dollar businesses and brands. With Hollywood's exclusive Sundance Film Festival in their backyards, these Type-A power-brokers are accustomed to rubbing elbows with A-listers and what party list you are on means everything. They have mastered running wildly successful enterprises by day and enjoy après ski at the finest resorts by night, all the while raising extraordinary and unconventional families. Here perfection is not an aspiration, it's a mandate. They hold themselves and each other to an extremely high standard and never hold back when things go sideways, but lord knows they are always there for each other when they need it most.

item.title: Tracker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Tracker.

Tracker features lone-wolf survivalist Colter Shaw, who roams the country as a "reward seeker," using his expert tracking skills to help private citizens and law enforcement to solve all manner of mysteries while contending with his own fractured family.

item.title: The War Between the Land and the Sea
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The War Between the Land and the Sea.

When a fearsome and ancient species emerges from the ocean, dramatically revealing themselves to humanity, an international crisis is triggered. With the entire population at risk, UNIT step into action as the land and sea wage war.

item.title: Spartacus: House of Ashur
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spartacus: House of Ashur.

Spartacus: House of Ashur poses the question: What if Ashur hadn't died on Mount Vesuvius at the end of Spartacus: Vengeance? And what if he had been gifted the gladiator school once owned by Batiatus in return for aiding the Romans in killing Spartacus and ending the slave rebellion?

item.title: Blue Lights
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Blue Lights.

For three police recruits in Belfast, the pressure is immense. Facing criminal gangs and divided communities, they don't know who to trust. The odds are they won't all make it.
